Jamaat-e-Islami menjadi kekuatan utama dalam politik Pakistan dan menginspirasi gerakan-gerakan serupa di tempat lain. Gagasan-gagasannya mendapat pujian atas penyajian Islam secara sistematis sebagai jalan hidup yang komprehensif, sekaligus mendapat kritik dari sejumlah ulama tradisional yang mempertanyakan sebagian penafsirannya. Ia wafat di Buffalo, New York, saat sedang menjalani perawatan medis.

bio_short_en: Syrian Hanafi jurist and one of the foremost authorities on Islamic law in the modern period. Author of al-Madkhal al-Fiqhi al-Amm and a pioneer in codifying Islamic legal maxims (qawa'id fiqhiyyah).
bio_en:
Mustafa Ahmad az-Zarqa (1904-1999 CE / 1322-1420 AH) was a Syrian Hanafi jurist who is widely regarded as one of the foremost authorities on Islamic law in the modern era. Born in Aleppo into a family of scholars (his father Ahmad az-Zarqa was also a notable jurist), he studied Islamic sciences traditionally before also obtaining a law degree from Damascus University.

Az-Zarqa's most important work is al-Madkhal al-Fiqhi al-Amm (The General Introduction to Islamic Jurisprudence), a comprehensive two-volume work that presents Islamic law in a systematic, modern academic framework while remaining faithful to its classical foundations. This work became a standard university textbook across the Arab world. He also authored al-Fiqh al-Islami fi Thawbihi al-Jadid (Islamic Jurisprudence in its New Form), a multi-volume systematization of Hanafi law, and al-Istislah wal-Masalih al-Mursalah on juristic reasoning in the public interest. He served as a professor at Damascus University and later at the University of Jordan.

Az-Zarqa combined deep traditional scholarship with modern legal thinking, making him uniquely qualified to address contemporary questions in Islamic law. He was a member of the Islamic Fiqh Academy and contributed to numerous conferences on Islamic finance, law, and governance. His works helped bridge the gap between classical fiqh and modern legal systems, and his students include many of the leading Islamic jurists of the late 20th and early 21st centuries. He passed away in Riyadh.
bio_id:
Mustafa Ahmad az-Zarqa (1904-1999 M / 1322-1420 H) adalah seorang ahli fiqih Hanafi asal Suriah yang dipandang luas sebagai salah satu otoritas terkemuka dalam hukum Islam di era modern. Lahir di Aleppo dari keluarga ulama — ayahnya Ahmad az-Zarqa juga seorang ahli hukum terkemuka — beliau menempuh pendidikan ilmu-ilmu Islam secara tradisional sebelum kemudian meraih gelar sarjana hukum dari Universitas Damaskus.

Karya terpenting az-Zarqa adalah al-Madkhal al-Fiqhi al-Amm (Pengantar Umum Fikih Islam), sebuah karya komprehensif dua jilid yang menyajikan hukum Islam dalam kerangka akademis modern yang sistematis namun tetap setia pada fondasi klasiknya. Karya ini menjadi buku teks standar di berbagai universitas di dunia Arab. Beliau juga menulis al-Fiqh al-Islami fi Thawbihi al-Jadid (Fikih Islam dalam Wajah Barunya), sebuah sistematisasi hukum Hanafi dalam beberapa jilid, serta al-Istislah wal-Masalih al-Mursalah tentang penalaran hukum demi kepentingan umum. Beliau mengajar sebagai profesor di Universitas Damaskus dan kemudian di Universitas Yordania.

Az-Zarqa memadukan keilmuan tradisional yang mendalam dengan pemikiran hukum modern, sehingga menjadikannya sangat berkompeten untuk menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan kontemporer dalam hukum Islam. Beliau merupakan anggota Majma' al-Fiqh al-Islami dan berkontribusi dalam berbagai konferensi mengenai keuangan Islam, hukum, dan tata kelola pemerintahan. Karya-karyanya turut menjembatani kesenjangan antara fiqih klasik dan sistem hukum modern, dan di antara murid-muridnya terdapat banyak ahli fiqih Islam terkemuka pada akhir abad ke-20 dan awal abad ke-21. Beliau wafat di Riyadh.

bio_short_en: Egyptian teacher and founder of the Muslim Brotherhood movement.
bio_en:
Hasan ibn Ahmad ibn Abdurrahman al-Banna (1906-1949 CE / 1324-1368 AH) was an Egyptian teacher and activist who founded the Muslim Brotherhood (al-Ikhwan al-Muslimun) in 1928 in Ismailia, Egypt. Born in Mahmudiyya in the Nile Delta, he was raised in a scholarly family and studied at Dar al-Ulum in Cairo, qualifying as a teacher.

Hasan al-Banna founded the Muslim Brotherhood as a movement calling for comprehensive Islamic reform encompassing religious education, social welfare, and political engagement. Under his leadership, the organization grew rapidly across Egypt, establishing schools, hospitals, charitable organizations, and businesses. His writings, collected as Majmu'at Rasa'il al-Imam ash-Shahid Hasan al-Banna (The Collected Letters), outlined his vision of Islam as a comprehensive system addressing all aspects of life and called for the gradual Islamization of society through education and grassroots activism.

The Muslim Brotherhood became one of the most influential Islamic movements of the 20th century, spreading to numerous Arab and Muslim countries. Al-Banna's organizational genius and his ability to combine religious discourse with social action and political engagement created a model that many later Islamic movements adopted. He was assassinated in Cairo in 1949, likely by Egyptian government agents. His legacy remains deeply contested, with supporters viewing him as a visionary Islamic reformer and critics raising concerns about the political dimensions of his movement.
bio_id:
Hasan ibn Ahmad ibn Abdurrahman al-Banna (1906-1949 M / 1324-1368 H) adalah seorang guru dan aktivis Mesir yang mendirikan Ikhwanul Muslimin (al-Ikhwan al-Muslimun) pada tahun 1928 di Ismailia, Mesir. Lahir di Mahmudiyya di kawasan Delta Nil, ia dibesarkan dalam keluarga yang memiliki latar belakang keilmuan dan menempuh pendidikan di Dar al-Ulum di Kairo, sehingga memperoleh kualifikasi sebagai seorang guru.

Hasan al-Banna mendirikan Ikhwanul Muslimin sebagai sebuah gerakan yang menyerukan reformasi Islam secara menyeluruh, mencakup pendidikan agama, kesejahteraan sosial, dan keterlibatan politik. Di bawah kepemimpinannya, organisasi ini berkembang pesat di seluruh Mesir, membangun sekolah, rumah sakit, lembaga amal, dan berbagai usaha. Tulisan-tulisannya, yang dikumpulkan dalam Majmu'at Rasa'il al-Imam ash-Shahid Hasan al-Banna (Kumpulan Surat-surat Imam Syahid Hasan al-Banna), menguraikan visinya tentang Islam sebagai sistem yang komprehensif dan mencakup seluruh aspek kehidupan, serta menyerukan proses Islamisasi masyarakat secara bertahap melalui pendidikan dan gerakan akar rumput.

Ikhwanul Muslimin menjadi salah satu gerakan Islam paling berpengaruh pada abad ke-20, menyebar ke berbagai negara Arab dan Muslim. Kecerdasan organisasi al-Banna serta kemampuannya memadukan wacana keagamaan dengan aksi sosial dan keterlibatan politik menciptakan sebuah model yang kemudian diadopsi oleh banyak gerakan Islam sesudahnya. Ia dibunuh di Kairo pada tahun 1949, kemungkinan besar oleh agen-agen pemerintah Mesir. Warisannya hingga kini masih menjadi perdebatan sengit; para pendukungnya memandangnya sebagai seorang reformis Islam yang visioner, sementara para pengkritiknya mengangkat kekhawatiran mengenai dimensi politik dari gerakannya.

bio_short_en: Egyptian author of Fi Zilal al-Quran, an influential literary and thematic tafsir.
bio_en:
Sayyid Qutb Ibrahim Husayn Shadili (1906-1966 CE / 1324-1386 AH) was an Egyptian author, literary critic, and Islamic thinker who became one of the most influential ideologues of the 20th-century Islamic revival. Born in Musha, Upper Egypt, he was initially a literary critic and educator before undergoing a transformation toward Islamic activism, deepened by a period spent in the United States (1948-1950) that left him critical of Western materialism.

Qutb's most important work is Fi Zilal al-Quran (In the Shade of the Quran), a comprehensive, literary tafsir of the entire Quran that combines Quranic interpretation with social and political commentary. Written partly during his years in prison, it became one of the most widely read tafsirs of the modern era. His other highly influential work, Ma'alim fit-Tariq (Milestones), presented a radical vision of Islamic activism that called for the establishment of a truly Islamic society and critiqued existing Muslim societies as living in a state of jahiliyyah (pre-Islamic ignorance).

Qutb joined the Muslim Brotherhood and was imprisoned after the failed assassination attempt on President Nasser in 1954. He spent over a decade in prison, where he wrote much of his most influential work. He was executed by the Egyptian government in 1966. His writings, particularly Ma'alim fit-Tariq, have generated extensive debate. His literary tafsir Fi Zilal al-Quran is widely appreciated for its eloquence and spiritual depth, while his political ideas have been both embraced by some activist movements and strongly criticized by mainstream scholars who disagreed with his concept of declaring Muslim societies to be in a state of jahiliyyah.
bio_id:
Sayyid Qutb Ibrahim Husayn Shadili (1906-1966 M / 1324-1386 H) adalah seorang penulis, kritikus sastra, dan pemikir Islam asal Mesir yang menjadi salah satu ideolog paling berpengaruh dalam kebangkitan Islam abad ke-20. Lahir di Musha, Mesir Hulu, ia awalnya dikenal sebagai kritikus sastra dan pendidik sebelum mengalami perubahan arah menuju aktivisme Islam, yang semakin menguat setelah ia menghabiskan waktu di Amerika Serikat (1948-1950) dan pulang dengan sikap kritis terhadap materialisme Barat.

Karya terpenting Qutb adalah Fi Zilal al-Quran (Di Bawah Naungan Al-Quran), sebuah tafsir Al-Quran yang komprehensif dan bersifat sastrawi, memadukan penafsiran ayat-ayat Al-Quran dengan komentar sosial dan politik. Sebagian besar ditulis selama masa penjaranya, kitab ini menjadi salah satu tafsir yang paling banyak dibaca di era modern. Karya berpengaruhnya yang lain, Ma'alim fit-Tariq (Peta Jalan), memaparkan visi aktivisme Islam yang radikal, menyerukan pembentukan masyarakat Islam yang sejati, dan mengkritik masyarakat Muslim yang ada sebagai hidup dalam kondisi jahiliyyah (kebodohan pra-Islam).

Qutb bergabung dengan Ikhwanul Muslimin dan dipenjara setelah gagalnya percobaan pembunuhan terhadap Presiden Nasser pada tahun 1954. Ia menghabiskan lebih dari satu dekade di penjara, tempat ia menulis sebagian besar karya-karyanya yang paling berpengaruh. Ia dieksekusi oleh pemerintah Mesir pada tahun 1966. Tulisan-tulisannya, khususnya Ma'alim fit-Tariq, telah memicu perdebatan yang luas. Tafsir sastrawinya, Fi Zilal al-Quran, diapresiasi secara luas karena keindahan bahasanya dan kedalaman spiritualnya, sementara gagasan-gagasan politiknya telah diterima oleh sebagian gerakan aktivis namun dikritik keras oleh para ulama arus utama yang tidak sependapat dengan konsepnya tentang penghukuman masyarakat Muslim sebagai berada dalam kondisi jahiliyyah.

name_full_en: Muhammad al-Amin ibn Muhammad al-Mukhtar ash-Shinqiti
title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Author of Adwa al-Bayan, a tafsir that explains the Quran by the Quran, a Mauritanian polymath.
bio_en:
Muhammad al-Amin ibn Muhammad al-Mukhtar ash-Shinqiti (1907-1973 CE / 1325-1393 AH) was a Mauritanian scholar of remarkable breadth who settled in Saudi Arabia and became one of the most respected teachers at the Prophet's Mosque in Medina and at the Islamic University of Madinah. Born in Shinqit (Mauritania), he received a comprehensive traditional education in the Mauritanian scholarly tradition, memorizing vast amounts of classical Arabic literature, poetry, and Islamic texts.

Ash-Shinqiti's magnum opus is Adwa al-Bayan fi Idah al-Quran bil-Quran (Lights of Clarification in Explaining the Quran by the Quran), a monumental tafsir whose distinctive methodology is to explain Quranic verses primarily by reference to other Quranic verses. This approach, known as tafsir al-Quran bil-Quran, demonstrates the internal coherence and self-explanatory nature of the Quran. The work also incorporates hadith evidence, linguistic analysis, and juristic discussions. He also authored Mudhakkirah fi Usul al-Fiqh, an important text on the principles of jurisprudence, and Daf Iham al-Idtirab an Ayat al-Kitab on reconciling apparently contradictory Quranic verses.

Ash-Shinqiti was revered for his extraordinary memory, his mastery of the Arabic language, and his deep piety. His classes at the Prophet's Mosque attracted scholars from across the Muslim world. He was a founding faculty member at the Islamic University of Madinah and trained numerous students who became leading scholars. He passed away before completing Adwa al-Bayan; his student Atiyyah Muhammad Salim completed the final volume. He is widely considered one of the greatest scholars of Quranic exegesis in the modern era.
bio_id:
Mu­hammad al-Amin ibn Muhammad al-Mukhtar al-Shinqiti (1907–1973 M / 1325–1393 H) adalah seorang ulama Mauritania dengan keluasan ilmu yang luar biasa, yang kemudian menetap di Arab Saudi dan menjadi salah satu pengajar paling dihormati di Masjid Nabawi di Madinah serta di Universitas Islam Madinah. Beliau lahir di Shinqit (Mauritania) dan menerima pendidikan tradisional yang komprehensif dalam tradisi keilmuan Mauritania, dengan menghafal khazanah sastra Arab klasik, syair, serta teks-teks keislaman dalam jumlah yang sangat banyak.

Karya magnum opus al-Shinqiti adalah Adwa al-Bayan fi Idah al-Quran bil-Quran (Cahaya Penjelas dalam Menerangkan Al-Quran dengan Al-Quran), sebuah tafsir monumental yang metode khasnya adalah menjelaskan ayat-ayat Al-Quran terutama dengan merujuk kepada ayat-ayat Al-Quran yang lain. Pendekatan ini, yang dikenal sebagai tafsir al-Quran bil-Quran, membuktikan kepaduan internal dan sifat Al-Quran yang mampu menjelaskan dirinya sendiri. Karya ini juga mencakup dalil-dalil hadis, analisis kebahasaan, dan pembahasan-pembahasan fikih. Beliau juga menulis Mudzakkirah fi Ushul al-Fiqh, sebuah teks penting tentang prinsip-prinsip ushul fikih, serta Daf' Iham al-Idhtirab 'an Ayat al-Kitab tentang cara menyerasikan ayat-ayat Al-Quran yang tampak saling bertentangan.

Al-Shinqiti sangat dihormati karena daya hafalannya yang luar biasa, penguasaannya yang mendalam atas bahasa Arab, dan ketakwaannya yang tulus. Majelis beliau di Masjid Nabawi menarik para ulama dari seluruh penjuru dunia Islam. Beliau adalah salah satu pendiri dan anggota awal fakultas Universitas Islam Madinah, dan telah mendidik banyak murid yang kelak menjadi ulama-ulama terkemuka. Beliau wafat sebelum menyelesaikan Adwa al-Bayan; murid beliau, Athiyyah Muhammad Salim, melengkapi jilid terakhirnya. Beliau secara luas dianggap sebagai salah satu ulama tafsir Al-Quran terbesar di era modern.

bio_short_en: Mauritanian scholar and author of Adwa' al-Bayan, a tafsir that explains the Quran through the Quran itself. A master of multiple Islamic sciences who taught at the Islamic University of Medina.
bio_en:
Muhammad al-Amin ibn Muhammad al-Mukhtar ash-Shanqiti (1907-1973 CE / 1325-1393 AH) was a Mauritanian polymath and Quran commentator who became one of the most prominent scholars in Saudi Arabia. Raised in the rigorous Mauritanian scholarly tradition, he memorized the Quran, extensive hadith collections, and classical Arabic poetry before traveling to the Hijaz for Hajj, where he was invited to remain and teach.

His principal work, Adwa' al-Bayan fi Idah al-Quran bil-Quran, is recognized as one of the most important tafsirs of the 20th century. Its methodology of explaining Quranic verses by cross-referencing them with other verses reveals the remarkable consistency and interconnectedness of the Quran. The work also addresses legal questions, grammatical analysis, and points of creed. His Mudhakkirah fi Usul al-Fiqh is a clear and well-organized introduction to the principles of Islamic jurisprudence that is widely used as a teaching text. He also composed poetry and delivered lectures on a vast range of Islamic sciences.

Ash-Shanqiti's scholarly presence in Medina attracted students from across the Muslim world, and he was a founding member of the Islamic University of Madinah's faculty. His combination of Mauritanian erudition, Quranic mastery, and deep legal knowledge made him a unique figure in modern Islamic scholarship. Among his notable students was Muhammad ibn al-Uthaymeen. He passed away in Mecca during the Hajj season and his tafsir continues to be widely studied and cited.
bio_id:
ابن اسم الشيخ محمد الأمين بن محمد المختار الشنقيطي (1907-1973م / 1325-1393ه) adalah seorang ulama serbabisa dan ahli tafsir Al-Qur'an asal Mauritania yang menjadi salah satu ulama paling terkemuka di Arab Saudi. Dibesarkan dalam tradisi keilmuan Mauritania yang ketat, beliau menghafal Al-Qur'an, koleksi hadis yang luas, dan syair Arab klasik sebelum berangkat ke Hijaz untuk menunaikan ibadah haji, di mana beliau kemudian diundang untuk tinggal dan mengajar.

Karya utama beliau, Adwa' al-Bayan fi Idah al-Qur'an bil-Qur'an, diakui sebagai salah satu kitab tafsir terpenting pada abad ke-20. Metode yang digunakan—yaitu menafsirkan ayat-ayat Al-Qur'an dengan merujuk silang ayat-ayat lainnya—mengungkapkan konsistensi dan keterkaitan Al-Qur'an yang luar biasa. Kitab ini juga membahas permasalahan hukum, analisis tata bahasa, dan pokok-pokok akidah. Adapun kitab Mudzakkirah fi Ushul al-Fiqh merupakan pengantar ilmu ushul fikih yang jelas dan terstruktur dengan baik, dan telah digunakan secara luas sebagai bahan ajar. Beliau juga menggubah syair dan menyampaikan kuliah dalam berbagai cabang ilmu-ilmu Islam.

Kehadiran ilmiah Syaikh al-Shanqithy di Madinah menarik murid-murid dari seluruh dunia Islam, dan beliau merupakan salah satu pendiri pengajar di Universitas Islam Madinah. Perpaduan antara keilmuan khas Mauritania, penguasaan Al-Qur'an, dan kedalaman pengetahuan hukum menjadikan beliau sosok yang unik dalam khazanah keilmuan Islam modern. Di antara murid-murid beliau yang terkemuka adalah Muhammad bin Shalih al-'Utsaimin. Beliau wafat di Makkah pada musim haji, dan kitab tafsirnya terus dipelajari dan dijadikan rujukan hingga kini.

bio_short_en: Syrian scholar, judge, and prolific writer known for his literary style and pioneering Islamic television programs. His memoirs (Dhikrayat) and accessible books on Islam reached millions of readers across the Arab world.
bio_en:
Ali ibn Mustafa at-Tantawi (1909-1999 CE / 1327-1420 AH) was a Syrian scholar, judge, and prolific writer who became one of the most beloved Islamic literary figures of the Arab world. Born in Damascus into a family of scholars, he studied under leading Syrian scholars and was influenced by the writings of al-Manfaluti and Mustafa Sadiq ar-Rafi'i, developing an elegant Arabic prose style.

At-Tantawi served as a judge in the Syrian Shariah courts and later taught at the Islamic University of Madinah and at other Saudi institutions after leaving Syria. He pioneered Islamic programming on television and radio, becoming one of the first scholars to use modern media for Islamic education. His literary works include Dhikrayat (Memories), an eight-volume autobiography that is considered a masterpiece of modern Arabic prose; Qisas min at-Tarikh (Stories from History), engaging retellings of Islamic historical episodes; and Ta'rif Amm bi-Din al-Islam (A General Introduction to Islam), a widely read introduction to Islamic beliefs and practices.

At-Tantawi's gift was his ability to present Islamic knowledge in beautiful, accessible prose that engaged readers emotionally and intellectually. He wrote for newspapers and magazines throughout his career, reaching a broad audience beyond the traditional scholarly community. His approach combined scholarly substance with literary grace, and his works continue to be widely read across the Arab world. He passed away in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.
bio_id:
Ali ibn Mustafa at-Tantawi (1909-1999 M / 1327-1420 H) adalah seorang ulama, hakim, dan penulis produktif asal Suriah yang menjadi salah satu tokoh sastra Islam paling dicintai di dunia Arab. Lahir di Damaskus dari keluarga ulama, beliau belajar di bawah bimbingan ulama-ulama terkemuka Suriah dan dipengaruhi oleh karya-karya al-Manfaluti dan Mustafa Sadiq ar-Rafi'i, sehingga mengembangkan gaya prosa Arab yang elegan.

At-Tantawi pernah bertugas sebagai hakim di pengadilan syariah Suriah, kemudian mengajar di Universitas Islam Madinah dan lembaga-lembaga pendidikan di Arab Saudi setelah meninggalkan Suriah. Beliau menjadi pelopor program-program Islam di televisi dan radio, termasuk di antara ulama pertama yang memanfaatkan media modern untuk pendidikan Islam. Karya-karya sastranya meliputi Dhikrayat (Kenangan), sebuah otobiografi delapan jilid yang dianggap sebagai mahakarya prosa Arab modern; Qisas min at-Tarikh (Kisah-kisah dari Sejarah), penceritaan ulang episode-episode sejarah Islam yang memikat; serta Ta'rif Amm bi-Din al-Islam (Pengantar Umum tentang Agama Islam), sebuah pengantar kepada akidah dan praktik Islam yang dibaca secara luas.

Keistimewaan at-Tantawi terletak pada kemampuannya menyajikan ilmu Islam dalam prosa yang indah dan mudah diakses, yang mampu menyentuh pembaca secara emosional maupun intelektual. Sepanjang kariernya beliau menulis untuk berbagai surat kabar dan majalah, menjangkau khalayak luas di luar komunitas ulama tradisional. Pendekatannya memadukan kedalaman ilmiah dengan keanggunan sastra, dan karya-karyanya terus dibaca secara luas di seluruh dunia Arab. Beliau wafat di Jeddah, Arab Saudi.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Grand Mufti of Saudi Arabia, a major Hanbali scholar known for his fatwas, teaching, and charitable works.
bio_en:
Abdul-Aziz ibn Abdullah ibn Abdul-Rahman ibn Baz (1912-1999 CE / 1330-1420 AH) was the Grand Mufti of Saudi Arabia and one of the most influential Sunni scholars of the 20th century. Born in Riyadh, he studied under the leading scholars of the city, including Muhammad ibn Ibrahim Al ash-Sheikh. He lost his eyesight in his early twenties due to illness but continued his scholarly pursuits with remarkable determination, relying on his exceptional memory.

Ibn Baz served in numerous official religious positions throughout his career: judge in al-Kharj, head of the Islamic University of Madinah, head of the Permanent Committee for Islamic Research and Ifta, and finally Grand Mufti of Saudi Arabia from 1993 until his death. His fatawa, collected in Majmu Fatawa wa-Maqalat Mutanawwiah (spanning over thirty volumes), cover virtually every aspect of Islamic law and practice. He was known for his accessibility, with people from all walks of life consulting him on religious matters. He also authored important works on creed including Sharh Kitab at-Tawhid and wrote extensively on contemporary issues.

Ibn Baz was known for his humility, generosity, and devotion to teaching and issuing fatawa. He championed the cause of Islamic education and charitable work, establishing and supporting countless institutions. His legal opinions shaped religious practice across Saudi Arabia and influenced Muslims worldwide through his radio programs, published works, and the scholars he trained. Despite his blindness, his prodigious memory and dedication made him one of the most productive and accessible scholars of his era. He passed away in Riyadh and millions attended his funeral prayer.
bio_id:
Abdul-Aziz ibn Abdullah ibn Abdul-Rahman ibn Baz (1912–1999 M / 1330–1420 H) adalah Mufti Besar Arab Saudi dan salah satu ulama Sunni paling berpengaruh pada abad ke-20. Lahir di Riyadh, beliau menimba ilmu dari para ulama terkemuka kota tersebut, termasuk Muhammad ibn Ibrahim Alu asy-Syaikh. Beliau kehilangan penglihatannya di awal usia dua puluhan akibat penyakit, namun tetap melanjutkan perjuangan ilmiahnya dengan tekad yang luar biasa, mengandalkan kekuatan hafalannya yang istimewa.

Ibn Baz memegang berbagai jabatan keagamaan resmi sepanjang kariernya: hakim di al-Kharj, rektor Universitas Islam Madinah, ketua Lajnah Daimah lil-Buhuts al-Ilmiyyah wal-Ifta, dan akhirnya Mufti Besar Arab Saudi dari tahun 1993 hingga wafatnya. Fatawa-fatawa beliau, yang terhimpun dalam Majmu' Fatawa wa Maqalat Mutanawwi'ah (lebih dari tiga puluh jilid), mencakup hampir seluruh aspek hukum dan praktik Islam. Beliau dikenal mudah ditemui, dengan masyarakat dari berbagai kalangan yang datang berkonsultasi kepadanya dalam urusan agama. Beliau juga menulis karya-karya penting dalam bidang akidah, di antaranya Syarh Kitab at-Tauhid, serta banyak menulis tentang isu-isu kontemporer.

Ibn Baz dikenal karena kerendahan hati, kedermawanan, dan ketekunannya dalam mengajar serta mengeluarkan fatwa. Beliau memperjuangkan pendidikan Islam dan amal kebaikan, mendirikan serta mendukung banyak lembaga. Pendapat-pendapat hukumnya membentuk praktik keagamaan di seluruh Arab Saudi dan memberikan pengaruh kepada umat Muslim di seluruh dunia melalui program radio, karya-karya yang diterbitkan, dan para ulama yang beliau didik. Meski buta, hafalan beliau yang luar biasa dan dedikasinya menjadikannya salah satu ulama paling produktif dan mudah diakses di zamannya. Beliau wafat di Riyadh dan jutaan orang menghadiri shalat jenazahnya.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: One of the foremost hadith scholars of the modern era, spending decades grading thousands of hadith.
bio_en:
Muhammad Nasir ad-Din ibn Nuh Najati al-Albani (1914-1999 CE / 1332-1420 AH) was one of the most influential hadith scholars of the modern era. Born in Shkodra, Albania, his family emigrated to Damascus when he was a child. He learned watchmaking from his father and was largely self-taught in the Islamic sciences, spending years studying hadith manuscripts in the Zahiriyyah Library of Damascus, where he developed his extraordinary expertise in hadith authentication.

Al-Albani's scholarly output was immense and transformative. His most important works include Silsilat al-Ahadith as-Sahihah (Series of Authentic Hadith) and Silsilat al-Ahadith ad-Da'ifah (Series of Weak Hadith), which together comprise thousands of hadith with detailed authentication. He also produced authenticated editions of the major hadith collections: Sahih and Da'if Sunan Abi Dawud, Sahih and Da'if Sunan at-Tirmidhi, Sahih and Da'if Sunan an-Nasa'i, Sahih and Da'if Sunan Ibn Majah, and Sahih al-Jami as-Saghir. His Irwa al-Ghalil verified the hadith evidence behind Hanbali fiqh rulings, and Sifat Salat an-Nabi described the Prophet's prayer based on authenticated evidence.

Al-Albani spent periods teaching at the Islamic University of Madinah and later settled in Amman, Jordan, where he continued his research until his death. He was awarded the King Faisal International Prize for Islamic Studies in 1999. His methodology of evaluating hadith according to their chain of narration, independent of the opinions of any legal school, revitalized the science of hadith criticism in the modern era. His gradings are widely referenced by scholars and students worldwide, and he is considered alongside Ibn Baz and Ibn al-Uthaymeen as one of the three most influential Sunni scholars of the late 20th century.
bio_id:
Muhammad Nasir ad-Din ibn Nuh Najati al-Albani (1914–1999 M / 1332–1420 H) adalah salah satu ulama hadits paling berpengaruh di era modern. Beliau lahir di Shkodra, Albania, dan keluarganya berhijrah ke Damaskus ketika ia masih kecil. Ia mempelajari keahlian membuat jam dari ayahnya, dan sebagian besar ilmu-ilmu keislamannya dipelajari secara otodidak. Beliau menghabiskan bertahun-tahun menelaah manuskrip-manuskrip hadits di Perpustakaan Zahiriyyah, Damaskus, tempat ia mengembangkan keahliannya yang luar biasa dalam bidang otentikasi hadits.

Karya ilmiah al-Albani sangat besar dan memberikan pengaruh yang mendalam. Karya-karya terpentingnya mencakup Silsilat al-Ahadith as-Sahihah (Rangkaian Hadits Shahih) dan Silsilat al-Ahadith ad-Da'ifah (Rangkaian Hadits Dha'if), yang bersama-sama memuat ribuan hadits beserta penelitian otentikasi yang terperinci. Beliau juga menyusun edisi-edisi tersaring dari kitab-kitab hadits utama: Shahih dan Dha'if Sunan Abi Dawud, Shahih dan Dha'if Sunan at-Tirmidzi, Shahih dan Dha'if Sunan an-Nasa'i, Shahih dan Dha'if Sunan Ibnu Majah, serta Shahih al-Jami' as-Shaghir. Karyanya Irwa' al-Ghalil memverifikasi dalil-dalil hadits yang mendasari hukum-hukum fiqih Hanbali, sementara Sifat Shalat an-Nabi menggambarkan tata cara shalat Nabi berdasarkan dalil-dalil yang telah disahihkan.

Al-Albani pernah mengajar di Universitas Islam Madinah, dan kemudian menetap di Amman, Yordania, tempat ia melanjutkan penelitiannya hingga wafat. Pada tahun 1999, beliau dianugerahi Penghargaan Internasional Raja Faishal untuk Kajian Keislaman. Metodologinya dalam menilai hadits berdasarkan sanad, terlepas dari pendapat mazhab fiqih mana pun, menghidupkan kembali ilmu kritik hadits di era modern. Penilaian-penilaian beliau banyak dirujuk oleh para ulama dan penuntut ilmu di seluruh dunia. Beliau dipandang bersama Ibnu Baz dan Ibnu al-'Utsaimin sebagai tiga ulama Sunni paling berpengaruh pada akhir abad ke-20.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Syrian Hanafi hadith scholar who produced critical editions of major hadith works.
bio_en:
Abdul-Fattah Abu Ghuddah (1917-1997 CE / 1336-1417 AH) was a Syrian Hanafi scholar, hadith expert, and educator born in Aleppo. He studied under the leading scholars of Syria, including Ahmad al-Kurdi, Isa al-Bayanouni, and the great hadith master Muhammad Raghib at-Tabbakh. He also studied under Muhammad Zahid al-Kawthari in Egypt, who had a profound influence on his scholarly development.

Abu Ghuddah made his most lasting contributions through his meticulous critical editions of classical hadith and scholarly works. He edited and annotated al-Ajwibah al-Fadilah of al-Laknawi, Sharh Nukhbat al-Fikar of Ibn Hajar, al-Raf wat-Takmil of al-Laknawi, Qawa'id fi Ulum al-Hadith of al-Uthmani, and dozens of other classical texts. Each edition features detailed introductions, scholarly annotations, and biographical research on the authors. He also authored original works including Safahat min Sabr al-Ulama (Pages from the Patience of Scholars), a beloved collection of inspiring stories about scholarly perseverance.

Abu Ghuddah served in the Syrian parliament and was active in Islamic education and dawah before eventually settling in Saudi Arabia. He taught at the Imam Muhammad ibn Saud Islamic University in Riyadh and King Saud University. His editorial work set a standard for precision and thoroughness in Islamic publishing, and he trained a generation of students in the art of critical manuscript editing. He passed away in Riyadh and his critical editions remain among the most reliable available for the works he edited.
bio_id:
ابتعداً الفتاح أبو غدة (1917-1997م / 1336-1417هـ) adalah seorang ulama Hanafi dari Suriah, pakar hadis, dan pendidik yang lahir di Aleppo. Beliau menuntut ilmu kepada para ulama terkemuka Suriah, di antaranya Ahmad al-Kurdi, Isa al-Bayanouni, dan ulama hadis besar Muhammad Raghib al-Tabbakh. Beliau juga belajar kepada Muhammad Zahid al-Kawthari di Mesir, yang memberikan pengaruh mendalam terhadap perkembangan keilmuannya.

Abu Ghudah memberikan kontribusi paling abadi melalui edisi-edisi kritis yang cermat atas karya-karya hadis dan keilmuan klasik. Beliau menyunting dan memberi anotasi pada Al-Ajwibah al-Fadhilah karya al-Laknawi, Syarh Nukhbat al-Fikar karya Ibnu Hajar, Al-Raf' wa al-Takmil karya al-Laknawi, Qawa'id fi 'Ulum al-Hadis karya al-Utsmani, dan puluhan teks klasik lainnya. Setiap edisi dilengkapi dengan pengantar yang mendalam, anotasi ilmiah, serta penelitian biografi mengenai para pengarangnya. Beliau juga menulis karya-karya orisinal, di antaranya Safahat min Sabr al-'Ulama, sebuah kumpulan kisah-kisah menginspirasi tentang kesabaran para ulama yang sangat dicintai pembacanya.

Abu Ghudah pernah menjabat sebagai anggota parlemen Suriah dan aktif dalam pendidikan Islam serta dakwah, sebelum akhirnya menetap di Arab Saudi. Beliau mengajar di Universitas Islam Imam Muhammad bin Saud di Riyadh dan Universitas King Saud. Karya-karya editorialnya menetapkan standar ketelitian dan kesempurnaan dalam penerbitan Islam, dan beliau telah mendidik satu generasi murid dalam seni penyuntingan manuskrip secara kritis. Beliau wafat di Riyadh, dan edisi-edisi kritis karyanya hingga kini tetap termasuk yang paling dapat diandalkan untuk karya-karya yang beliau sunting.

bio_short_en: Egyptian-Qatari scholar and chairman of the International Union of Muslim Scholars. Author of over 120 books including The Lawful and the Prohibited in Islam, and a prominent voice for centrist Islamic jurisprudence.
bio_en:
Yusuf ibn Abdullah al-Qaradawi (1926-2022 CE / 1345-1444 AH) was an Egyptian-born scholar who became one of the most widely known and prolific Islamic scholars of the contemporary era. Born in a village in the Nile Delta, he studied at al-Azhar and earned his doctorate from there. He later settled in Qatar, where he spent most of his professional life.

Al-Qaradawi authored over 120 books covering fiqh, theology, Quranic studies, economics, politics, and social issues. His most important work is al-Halal wal-Haram fil-Islam (The Lawful and the Prohibited in Islam), which became one of the most widely read Islamic books of the 20th century. His Fiqh az-Zakah is a comprehensive study of Islamic alms-giving, and Fiqh al-Awlawiyyat (Jurisprudence of Priorities) proposes a methodology for prioritizing Islamic rulings. His tafsir, completed later in life, was also widely circulated. He advocated for what he called wasatiyyah (moderation and balance) in Islamic thought.

Al-Qaradawi served as chairman of the International Union of Muslim Scholars and was the founding chairman of the European Council for Fatwa and Research. He reached millions through his television program ash-Shari'ah wal-Hayah (Islamic Law and Life) on Al Jazeera. His approach to fiqh emphasized ease over hardship, engagement with modern realities, and the objectives of Islamic law (maqasid ash-shari'ah). He was both widely followed and controversially received, with traditional scholars sometimes questioning his more lenient positions. He passed away in Doha, Qatar.
bio_id:
Yusuf ibn Abdullah al-Qaradawi (1926-2022 M / 1345-1444 H) adalah seorang ulama kelahiran Mesir yang menjadi salah satu ulama Islam paling dikenal dan produktif di era kontemporer. Lahir di sebuah desa di Delta Nil, ia menempuh pendidikan di al-Azhar dan meraih gelar doktor dari universitas tersebut. Ia kemudian menetap di Qatar, tempat ia menghabiskan sebagian besar masa kerjanya.

Al-Qaradawi menulis lebih dari 120 buku yang mencakup fiqh, teologi, kajian Al-Qur'an, ekonomi, politik, dan isu-isu sosial. Karya terpentingnya adalah al-Halal wal-Haram fil-Islam, yang menjadi salah satu buku Islam paling banyak dibaca pada abad ke-20. Fiqh az-Zakah-nya merupakan kajian komprehensif tentang zakat dalam Islam, sementara Fiqh al-Awlawiyyat mengusulkan metodologi untuk menentukan skala prioritas dalam hukum Islam. Tafsirnya, yang diselesaikan di penghujung hayatnya, juga tersebar luas. Ia mengadvokasi apa yang ia sebut wasatiyyah (moderasi dan keseimbangan) dalam pemikiran Islam.

Al-Qaradawi menjabat sebagai ketua Persatuan Ulama Muslim Internasional dan merupakan ketua pendiri Dewan Eropa untuk Fatwa dan Penelitian. Ia menjangkau jutaan orang melalui program televisinya ash-Shari'ah wal-Hayah di Al Jazeera. Pendekatannya dalam fiqh menekankan kemudahan di atas kesulitan, keterlibatan dengan realitas modern, dan maqasid ash-shari'ah. Ia sekaligus banyak diikuti dan menuai kontroversi; para ulama tradisional terkadang mempertanyakan posisi-posisinya yang lebih longgar. Ia wafat di Doha, Qatar.

bio_short_en: Saudi scholar and former Mufti of the southern region of Saudi Arabia. Known for his teaching, fatwa work, and his commentary on Sunni creed texts.
bio_en:
Ahmad ibn Yahya ibn Muhammad an-Najmi (1927-2008 CE / 1346-1429 AH) was a Saudi scholar who served as the Mufti of the Jazan region in southern Saudi Arabia. Born in the village of Najamiyyah near Jazan, he studied under local scholars before pursuing higher studies, learning from senior scholars of the kingdom including Shaykh Muhammad ibn Ibrahim Aal ash-Sheikh and Shaykh Abd al-Aziz ibn Baz.

An-Najmi was known as a staunch defender of the Salafi methodology and an outspoken critic of innovations in religion (bid'ah). He authored numerous works on Salafi aqeedah, refutations of deviant groups, and issues in contemporary Islamic thought. Among his works are Radd al-Jawab ala al-Kawthari and various treatises on matters of creed and methodology. He was also a teacher who trained scholars in the Jazan region.

He served as the Mufti of Jazan for many decades and was a member of scholarly councils in Saudi Arabia. His approach to aqeedah was firmly Athari, following the methodology of the scholars of Najd in rejecting theological speculation and affirming the divine attributes as they appear in the Quran and Sunnah. He was particularly known for his detailed responses to groups he considered to have deviated from the Salafi path.

An-Najmi's influence extended through both his books and his students. He passed away in 2008, having dedicated his scholarly life to preserving the Athari creed and Salafi methodology in the Jazan region. He is remembered as one of the distinguished regional scholars of Saudi Arabia whose work complemented the broader efforts of the major national-level scholars of his time.
bio_id:
BUKAN TUGAS PENGKODEAN

Terjemahan yang diminta memang bukan tugas pemrograman, namun masih berkaitan dengan konten proyek yang sedang aktif (biografi ulama dalam Bahasa Inggris yang perlu diterjemahkan ke Bahasa Indonesia untuk data `scholars.json`). Berikut terjemahannya:

---

Ahmad ibn Yahya ibn Muhammad al-Najmi (1927–2008 M / 1346–1429 H) adalah seorang ulama Saudi yang menjabat sebagai Mufti wilayah Jazan di bagian selatan Arab Saudi. Lahir di desa Najamiyyah dekat Jazan, beliau menuntut ilmu dari ulama-ulama setempat sebelum melanjutkan studi ke jenjang lebih tinggi, dan belajar dari ulama-ulama senior kerajaan, termasuk Syaikh Muhammad ibn Ibrahim Aal asy-Syaikh dan Syaikh Abd al-Aziz ibn Baz.

Al-Najmi dikenal sebagai pembela teguh manhaj Salafi dan pengkritik vokal terhadap bid'ah. Beliau menulis banyak karya mengenai akidah Salafi, bantahan terhadap kelompok-kelompok menyimpang, dan persoalan-persoalan pemikiran Islam kontemporer. Di antara karya-karyanya adalah Radd al-Jawab 'ala al-Kawtsari dan berbagai risalah mengenai masalah akidah dan manhaj. Beliau juga seorang pengajar yang mendidik para ulama di wilayah Jazan.

Beliau menjabat sebagai Mufti Jazan selama beberapa dekade dan menjadi anggota majelis-majelis ilmiah di Arab Saudi. Pendekatannya terhadap akidah bersifat Atsari secara tegas, mengikuti manhaj ulama-ulama Najd dalam menolak spekulasi teologis dan menetapkan sifat-sifat Allah sebagaimana tercantum dalam Al-Qur'an dan Sunnah. Beliau khususnya dikenal dengan bantahan-bantahannya yang terperinci terhadap kelompok-kelompok yang dianggapnya telah menyimpang dari jalan Salafi.

Pengaruh al-Najmi meluas melalui karya-karya tulisnya maupun para muridnya. Beliau wafat pada tahun 2008, setelah mendedikasikan hidupnya dalam keilmuan untuk menjaga akidah Atsari dan manhaj Salafi di wilayah Jazan. Beliau dikenang sebagai salah satu ulama daerah terkemuka di Arab Saudi yang karyanya melengkapi upaya-upaya lebih luas dari para ulama besar tingkat nasional pada masanya.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Albanian-Syrian hadith scholar who produced definitive critical editions of Musnad Ahmad, Sahih Ibn Hibban, and many other works.
bio_en:
Shu'ayb ibn Muharram al-Arna'ut (1928-2016 CE / 1346-1438 AH) was an Albanian-origin hadith scholar who settled in Damascus, Syria, and became one of the most important hadith authenticators and manuscript editors of the modern era. Born in Albania, his family moved to Damascus when he was a child. He studied under Syrian scholars and devoted his life to hadith authentication and critical editing.

Al-Arnaut's most monumental achievement is his critical edition of Musnad Ahmad ibn Hanbal, a project that took over two decades and resulted in a fifty-volume edition with detailed authentication of every hadith. He also produced definitive editions of Sahih Ibn Hibban, Siyar A'lam an-Nubala of adh-Dhahabi, Sharh Mushkil al-Athar of at-Tahawi, Zad al-Ma'ad of Ibn al-Qayyim, Sharh as-Sunnah of al-Baghawi, and dozens of other classical works. His team-based approach to hadith verification set a new standard in the field.

Al-Arnaut's hadith gradings are widely respected and frequently cited alongside those of al-Albani, and where the two scholars differ, their respective analyses are carefully weighed by later researchers. His emphasis on rigorous methodology, combined with a balanced approach that respected the positions of all the major hadith scholars, earned him widespread trust. He was awarded the King Faisal International Prize for Islamic Studies in 2014 in recognition of his lifetime of service to hadith scholarship. He passed away in Amman, Jordan.
bio_id:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ

Syu'aib bin Muharram al-Arna'uth (1928-2016 M / 1346-1438 H) adalah seorang ulama hadis keturunan Albania yang menetap di Damaskus, Suriah, dan menjadi salah satu ahli takhrij hadis dan editor manuskrip terpenting pada era modern. Lahir di Albania, keluarganya pindah ke Damaskus saat ia masih kecil. Ia belajar kepada para ulama Suriah dan mendedikasikan hidupnya untuk takhrij hadis dan tahqiq ilmiah.

Pencapaian terbesar al-Arna'uth adalah edisi kritis Musnad Ahmad bin Hanbal, sebuah proyek yang memakan waktu lebih dari dua dekade dan menghasilkan edisi lima puluh jilid dengan takhrij terperinci untuk setiap hadis. Ia juga menghasilkan edisi definitif Shahih Ibn Hibban, Siyar A'lam an-Nubala' karya adz-Dzahabi, Syarh Musykil al-Atsar karya ath-Thahawi, Zad al-Ma'ad karya Ibnu al-Qayyim, Syarh as-Sunnah karya al-Baghawi, dan puluhan karya klasik lainnya. Pendekatan kerjanya yang berbasis tim dalam verifikasi hadis menetapkan standar baru dalam bidang ini.

Hukum-hukum hadis al-Arna'uth sangat dihormati dan sering dikutip berdampingan dengan hukum-hukum al-Albani. Apabila kedua ulama ini berbeda pendapat, analisis masing-masing dikaji dengan saksama oleh para peneliti berikutnya. Penekanannya pada metodologi yang ketat, dikombinasikan dengan pendekatan yang seimbang dalam menghormati pandangan seluruh ulama hadis besar, menjadikannya dipercaya secara luas. Ia dianugerahi Penghargaan Internasional Raja Faisal untuk Kajian Islam pada tahun 2014 sebagai pengakuan atas pengabdian seumur hidupnya kepada ilmu hadis. Ia wafat di Amman, Yordania.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: A major Hanbali scholar known for his extensive commentary on jurisprudence and theology.
bio_en:
Muhammad ibn Salih ibn Muhammad ibn al-Uthaymeen (1929-2001 CE / 1347-1421 AH) was one of the most influential Sunni scholars of the 20th century, born in Unayzah in the Qasim region of Saudi Arabia. He studied under his townsman Abdurrahman as-Sa'di, who was his primary teacher, and later under Abdul-Aziz ibn Baz and Muhammad al-Amin ash-Shinqiti at the Islamic University of Madinah.

Ibn al-Uthaymeen was an extraordinarily prolific scholar whose works span virtually every field of Islamic knowledge. His most important works include ash-Sharh al-Mumti ala Zad al-Mustaqni, a comprehensive commentary on Hanbali fiqh that became a standard reference; Sharh al-Aqidah al-Wasitiyyah and Sharh Lum'at al-I'tiqad on Islamic creed; al-Usul min Ilm al-Usul on principles of jurisprudence; and Sharh Riyadh as-Salihin on the popular hadith collection. His Majmu Fatawa wa-Rasa'il covers over twenty volumes of legal opinions. His tafsir lectures, recorded over many years, were also compiled and published.

Ibn al-Uthaymeen served as imam of the Grand Mosque of Unayzah, professor at the Imam Muhammad ibn Saud Islamic University (Qasim branch), and member of the Council of Senior Scholars. He was known for his clarity of explanation, his deep compassion for questioners, and his ability to make complex juristic discussions accessible. Together with Ibn Baz and al-Albani, he is regarded as one of the three pillars of late 20th-century Sunni scholarship. His recorded lectures number in the thousands and continue to be widely distributed. He passed away in Jeddah.
bio_id:
السلام عليكم

Muhammad ibn Salih ibn Muhammad ibn al-'Uthaymeen (1929–2001 M / 1347–1421 H) adalah salah satu ulama Sunni paling berpengaruh pada abad ke-20, lahir di Unayzah di kawasan Qasim, Arab Saudi. Beliau belajar kepada sesama warga kotanya, Abdurrahman al-Sa'di, yang merupakan guru utamanya, kemudian melanjutkan studi kepada Abdul Aziz ibn Baz dan Muhammad al-Amin al-Shinqiti di Universitas Islam Madinah.

Ibn al-'Uthaymeen adalah seorang ulama yang luar biasa produktif; karya-karyanya mencakup hampir setiap bidang ilmu Islam. Di antara karya terpentingnya adalah Asy-Syarh al-Mumti' 'ala Zad al-Mustaqni', sebuah syarh komprehensif tentang fikih Hanbali yang menjadi rujukan utama; Syarh al-'Aqidah al-Wasithiyyah dan Syarh Lum'at al-I'tiqad dalam bidang akidah; Al-Ushul min 'Ilm al-Ushul tentang ushul fikih; serta Syarh Riyadh al-Shalihin atas kitab hadis yang masyhur tersebut. Majmu' Fatawa wa Rasa'il beliau mencakup lebih dari dua puluh jilid fatwa dan risalah. Rekaman ceramah tafsirnya selama bertahun-tahun juga telah dikumpulkan dan diterbitkan.

Ibn al-'Uthaymeen pernah menjabat sebagai imam Masjid Agung Unayzah, profesor di Universitas Islam Imam Muhammad ibn Saud cabang Qasim, serta anggota Dewan Ulama Senior. Beliau dikenal dengan kejelasan penjelasannya, kedalaman rasa kasih sayang terhadap para penanya, dan kemampuannya menjadikan pembahasan-pembahasan fikih yang rumit mudah dipahami. Bersama Ibn Baz dan al-Albani, beliau dipandang sebagai salah satu dari tiga pilar keilmuan Sunni pada akhir abad ke-20. Rekaman ceramah beliau berjumlah ribuan dan terus disebarluaskan secara luas. Beliau wafat di Jeddah.

bio_short_en: Ethiopian-born Shafi'i scholar who settled in Mecca and became a leading authority in Shafi'i fiqh and Ash'ari theology. Known for his encyclopedic work refuting deviant sects and his circles of learning at the Haram.
bio_en:
Muhammad ibn Abdullah al-Amin al-Harari al-Habashi (1929-2020 CE / 1348-1442 AH) was an Ethiopian-born Shafi'i scholar who settled in Mecca and became a respected authority in Shafi'i jurisprudence and Ash'ari theology. Born in the city of Harar in eastern Ethiopia, he received a thorough traditional education in Islamic sciences before emigrating to pursue advanced studies in the Hijaz.

Al-Harari studied under major scholars of the Arabian Peninsula and became deeply rooted in the Shafi'i legal tradition and Ash'ari theological school. He is best known for his monumental multi-volume Quranic commentary Hadaiq ar-Rawh war-Rayhan fi Rawabi Ulum al-Quran, which runs to over thirty volumes and combines tafsir, linguistic analysis, legal rulings, and Ash'ari theological explanations. He also authored detailed legal works in the Shafi'i tradition.

Beyond tafsir, al-Harari wrote extensively on Ash'ari theology, producing works that systematically explained and defended the Ash'ari position on divine attributes, the nature of faith, and related theological questions. His works reflect deep engagement with the classical Ash'ari and Maturidi tradition alongside mastery of the Shafi'i madhhab.

He taught for decades in Mecca, training students from across the Muslim world. His scholarly output was enormous, running to dozens of volumes. Al-Harari is particularly esteemed within Ash'ari and Shafi'i scholarly circles in East Africa and the broader Muslim world. He passed away in 2020, having lived to a very advanced age, and is regarded as one of the major authorities of the Shafi'i-Ash'ari tradition in the modern era.
bio_id:
Muhammad ibn Abdullah al-Amin al-Harari al-Habashi (1929-2020 M / 1348-1442 H) adalah seorang ulama bermazhab Syafi'i kelahiran Ethiopia yang menetap di Makkah dan menjadi otoritas terkemuka dalam fikih Syafi'i serta teologi Asy'ari. Lahir di kota Harar di timur Ethiopia, beliau menempuh pendidikan tradisional yang mendalam dalam ilmu-ilmu Islam sebelum berhijrah untuk melanjutkan studi tingkat lanjut di Hijaz.

Al-Harari belajar kepada ulama-ulama besar Jazirah Arab dan mengakar kuat dalam tradisi hukum Syafi'i serta mazhab teologi Asy'ari. Beliau paling dikenal melalui kitab tafsir Al-Quran monumentalnya yang terdiri dari puluhan jilid, Hadaiq ar-Rawh war-Rayhan fi Rawabi Ulum al-Quran, yang mencakup lebih dari tiga puluh jilid dan memadukan tafsir, analisis linguistik, hukum fikih, serta penjelasan teologi Asy'ari. Beliau juga menulis karya-karya fikih terperinci dalam tradisi Syafi'i.

Selain tafsir, al-Harari juga menulis secara luas tentang teologi Asy'ari, menghasilkan karya-karya yang menjelaskan dan membela posisi Asy'ari secara sistematis mengenai sifat-sifat Allah, hakikat iman, dan persoalan teologis terkait. Karya-karya beliau mencerminkan keterlibatan mendalam dengan tradisi Asy'ari dan Maturidi klasik seiring dengan penguasaannya terhadap mazhab Syafi'i.

Beliau mengajar selama puluhan tahun di Makkah, mendidik murid-murid dari seluruh penjuru dunia Islam. Hasil karya ilmiahnya sangat besar, mencapai puluhan jilid. Al-Harari sangat dihormati di kalangan ulama Asy'ari dan Syafi'i di Afrika Timur maupun di dunia Islam secara luas. Beliau wafat pada tahun 2020 dalam usia yang sangat lanjut, dan dipandang sebagai salah satu otoritas utama tradisi Syafi'i-Asy'ari di era modern.

bio_short_en: Syrian scholar and author of al-Fiqh al-Islami wa-Adillatuhu, a comprehensive comparative fiqh encyclopedia.
bio_en:
Wahba Mustafa az-Zuhayli (1932-2015 CE / 1351-1436 AH) was a Syrian scholar and one of the most prolific and respected Islamic jurists of the modern era. Born in Dair Atiyah near Damascus, he received both traditional Islamic education and modern academic training, earning a doctorate in Islamic law from al-Azhar University. He served as a professor at Damascus University's Faculty of Shariah for over four decades.

Az-Zuhayli's magnum opus is al-Fiqh al-Islami wa-Adillatuhu (Islamic Jurisprudence and its Evidences), an eight-volume encyclopedia that systematically presents the positions of all four Sunni schools of jurisprudence on every major legal question, along with their evidence. This work became the standard reference for comparative Islamic law in universities across the Muslim world. He also authored at-Tafsir al-Munir (The Illuminating Commentary), a comprehensive modern tafsir; al-Fiqh al-Islami fi Uslubih al-Jadid, a systematic presentation of Islamic law; and Athar al-Harb fil-Fiqh al-Islami on Islamic international law.

Az-Zuhayli authored over 200 books and research papers, making him one of the most productive Islamic scholars in history. He served on multiple international fiqh academies and Islamic finance boards. His ability to present classical Islamic law in a systematic, comparative, and accessible academic format made his works indispensable for modern students and practitioners of Islamic law. He was widely respected across different scholarly orientations for his balanced approach and encyclopedic knowledge. He passed away in Damascus.
bio_id:
Wilayah Mustafa al-Zuhaylī (1932-2015 M / 1351-1436 H) adalah seorang ulama Suriah dan salah satu ahli hukum Islam yang paling produktif dan berpengaruh di era modern. Lahir di Dair 'Athiyyah dekat Damaskus, beliau menempuh pendidikan Islam tradisional sekaligus pelatihan akademis modern, dan meraih gelar doktor dalam bidang hukum Islam dari Universitas al-Azhar. Beliau mengabdi sebagai profesor di Fakultas Syariah Universitas Damaskus selama lebih dari empat dekade.

Karya agung al-Zuhaylī adalah Al-Fiqh al-Islāmī wa Adillatuh (Fikih Islam dan Dalil-dalilnya), sebuah ensiklopedia delapan jilid yang memaparkan secara sistematis pandangan keempat mazhab Sunni terhadap setiap persoalan hukum utama beserta dalil-dalilnya. Karya ini menjadi referensi standar fikih Islam perbandingan di universitas-universitas di seluruh dunia Muslim. Beliau juga menulis Tafsīr al-Munīr (Tafsir yang Menerangi), sebuah tafsir modern yang komprehensif; Al-Fiqh al-Islāmī fī Uslūbih al-Jadīd, pemaparan sistematis tentang hukum Islam; serta Athar al-Harb fī al-Fiqh al-Islāmī yang membahas hukum internasional Islam.

Al-Zuhaylī menulis lebih dari 200 buku dan makalah penelitian, menjadikannya salah satu ulama Islam paling produktif sepanjang sejarah. Beliau menjadi anggota berbagai akademi fikih internasional dan dewan keuangan Islam. Kemampuannya menyajikan hukum Islam klasik dalam format akademis yang sistematis, komparatif, dan mudah dipahami menjadikan karya-karyanya sangat diperlukan oleh mahasiswa dan praktisi hukum Islam modern. Beliau dihormati secara luas di berbagai kalangan ulama karena pendekatan yang seimbang dan pengetahuannya yang ensiklopedis. Beliau wafat di Damaskus.

bio_short_en: Saudi scholar and former head of the Sunnah department at the Islamic University of Medina. Known for his works on hadith methodology and his critiques of deviant groups.
bio_en:
Rabi' ibn Hadi Umayr al-Madkhali (b. 1932 CE / 1351 AH) is a Saudi hadith scholar who served as the head of the Sunnah department at the Islamic University of Madinah. Born in the Jazan region of southwestern Saudi Arabia, he studied under leading Saudi scholars including Abdul-Aziz ibn Baz, Muhammad Nasir ad-Din al-Albani, and Muhammad al-Amin ash-Shinqiti at the Islamic University of Madinah, where he later became a professor.

Al-Madkhali's scholarly works focus primarily on hadith methodology and the defense of the Sunnah. His most well-known works include Manhaj al-Anbiya fid-Da'wah ilallah fih al-Hikmah wal-Aql (The Methodology of the Prophets in Calling to Allah) and Bayn al-Imamain Muslim wad-Daraqutni, a study comparing the hadith methodologies of Imam Muslim and ad-Daraqutni. He has also written several works critiquing individuals and movements that he considers deviant from the Salafi methodology.

Al-Madkhali is a prominent figure within the Salafi movement and his scholarly opinions on matters of methodology and religious orientation carry significant weight among his followers. He has been a prolific teacher whose students extend across the Muslim world. His emphasis on strict adherence to the methodology of the early generations and his critiques of what he views as partisan movements have made him both influential and controversial within contemporary Islamic discourse.
bio_id:
**MenerjemahkanBiografi al-Madkhali**

Rabi' bin Hadi 'Umayr al-Madkhali (lahir 1932 M / 1351 H) adalah seorang ulama hadis asal Arab Saudi yang pernah menjabat sebagai ketua departemen Sunnah di Universitas Islam Madinah. Lahir di wilayah Jizan di barat daya Arab Saudi, beliau menimba ilmu dari ulama-ulama terkemuka Arab Saudi, di antaranya Abdul Aziz bin Baz, Muhammad Nashiruddin al-Albani, dan Muhammad al-Amin asy-Syinqiti di Universitas Islam Madinah, tempat beliau kemudian menjadi dosen.

Karya-karya ilmiah al-Madkhali berfokus terutama pada metodologi hadis dan pembelaan terhadap Sunnah. Di antara karyanya yang paling dikenal adalah Manhaj al-Anbiya' fid-Da'wah ilallah fih al-Hikmah wal-'Aql (Metodologi Para Nabi dalam Berdakwah kepada Allah) dan Bayn al-Imamain Muslim wad-Daraquthni, sebuah kajian yang membandingkan metodologi hadis Imam Muslim dan ad-Daraquthni. Beliau juga telah menulis sejumlah karya yang mengkritik individu dan gerakan yang dianggapnya menyimpang dari manhaj Salafi.

Al-Madkhali adalah tokoh terkemuka dalam gerakan Salafi, dan pendapat-pendapat ilmiahnya dalam masalah metodologi dan orientasi keagamaan memiliki bobot yang signifikan di kalangan pengikutnya. Beliau adalah seorang pengajar yang produktif dengan murid-murid yang tersebar di seluruh dunia Islam. Penekanannya pada ketaatan ketat terhadap manhaj generasi awal serta kritikannya terhadap apa yang beliau pandang sebagai gerakan-gerakan hizbiyah menjadikannya sosok yang berpengaruh sekaligus kontroversial dalam wacana Islam kontemporer.

bio_short_en: Syrian scholar and author of al-Fiqh al-Islami wa Adillatuh, a comprehensive encyclopedia of Islamic jurisprudence comparing all four madhabs. Also authored a major tafsir, at-Tafsir al-Munir.
bio_en:
Wahbah Mustafa az-Zuhayli (1932-2015 CE / 1351-1436 AH) was a leading Syrian Islamic jurist and professor of Islamic law at Damascus University who authored one of the most comprehensive works of comparative Islamic jurisprudence ever written. Born in Dair Atiyah near Damascus, he pursued Islamic studies and obtained his doctorate from al-Azhar. He combined deep traditional knowledge with modern academic methodology.

His al-Fiqh al-Islami wa Adillatuh (Islamic Jurisprudence and its Proofs) is an encyclopedic work covering the positions and evidence of all four Sunni schools of law on every major topic of jurisprudence. Running to eight volumes, it became the standard comparative fiqh reference in Islamic law faculties worldwide. His at-Tafsir al-Munir is a modern tafsir in sixteen volumes that integrates linguistic analysis, legal derivations, and practical lessons from the Quranic text. He also authored Usul al-Fiqh al-Islami on juristic methodology and numerous specialized studies on Islamic finance, international relations, and family law.

Az-Zuhayli was a member of numerous international Islamic fiqh academies, including the International Islamic Fiqh Academy in Jeddah. His ability to present the richness of the Islamic legal tradition in a structured, comparative format that is accessible to modern readers, jurists, and policymakers is his greatest legacy. He supervised hundreds of doctoral dissertations and his students occupy key academic and judicial positions across the Muslim world. He passed away in Damascus.
bio_id:
Usohatunhan wa Musthafa az-Zuhayli (1932-2015 M / 1351-1436 H) adalah seorang ahli fiqih Islam terkemuka dari Suriah dan profesor hukum Islam di Universitas Damaskus yang menulis salah satu karya fikih perbandingan Islam paling komprehensif yang pernah ditulis. Beliau lahir di Dair 'Athiyah dekat Damaskus, menempuh studi ilmu Islam, dan meraih gelar doktor dari Al-Azhar. Beliau memadukan penguasaan ilmu tradisional yang mendalam dengan metodologi akademik modern.

Kitabnya Al-Fiqh Al-Islami wa Adillatuhu adalah karya ensiklopedis yang mencakup pendapat dan dalil keempat mazhab Sunni dalam setiap pokok pembahasan fikih. Terdiri dari delapan jilid, karya ini menjadi referensi fikih perbandingan utama di fakultas-fakultas hukum Islam di seluruh dunia. Tafsir Al-Munir karya beliau merupakan tafsir modern dalam enam belas jilid yang memadukan analisis kebahasaan, istinbath hukum, dan pelajaran praktis dari teks Al-Qur'an. Beliau juga mengarang Ushul Al-Fiqh Al-Islami tentang metodologi hukum Islam, serta berbagai kajian khusus mengenai keuangan Islam, hubungan internasional, dan hukum keluarga.

Az-Zuhayli merupakan anggota berbagai akademi fikih Islam internasional, termasuk Majma' Al-Fiqh Al-Islami Al-Duwali di Jeddah. Warisan terbesar beliau adalah kemampuannya menyajikan kekayaan tradisi hukum Islam dalam format yang terstruktur dan komparatif sehingga mudah dijangkau oleh pembaca modern, para ahli hukum, dan para pembuat kebijakan. Beliau membimbing ratusan disertasi doktoral, dan para muridnya kini menempati posisi-posisi penting dalam bidang akademik dan peradilan di seluruh dunia Islam. Beliau wafat di Damaskus.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Senior Saudi scholar and member of the Council of Senior Scholars, author of al-Mulakhkhas al-Fiqhi.
bio_en:
Salih ibn Fawzan ibn Abdullah al-Fawzan (b. 1933 CE / 1352 AH) is a senior Saudi scholar and member of the Council of Senior Scholars, the Permanent Committee for Islamic Research and Ifta, and several other prominent religious bodies in Saudi Arabia. Born in the village of ash-Shamasiyyah in the Qasim region, he studied at the Imam Muhammad ibn Saud Islamic University and later earned a doctorate in fiqh.

Al-Fawzan has authored numerous works on Islamic jurisprudence, creed, and contemporary issues. His most widely studied work is al-Mulakhkhas al-Fiqhi (The Concise Juristic Summary), a clear and comprehensive manual of Hanbali fiqh that became a standard textbook in Saudi Arabian religious institutions. He also authored Sharh al-Aqidah al-Wasitiyyah, a commentary on Ibn Taymiyyah's creedal text; I'anat al-Mustafid bi-Sharh Kitab at-Tawhid, a commentary on the creedal work of Muhammad ibn Abdul-Wahhab; and al-Irshad ila Sahih al-I'tiqad, a work on correct Islamic beliefs.

Al-Fawzan is one of the most prominent religious figures in Saudi Arabia and serves as a member of the highest religious advisory bodies in the kingdom. He has taught at the Imam Muhammad ibn Saud Islamic University for decades and his students include many of the current generation of Saudi scholars and judges. His works are widely used in Islamic educational curricula and his legal opinions carry significant weight in the Saudi scholarly establishment.
bio_id:
**Salih ibn Fawwan ibn Abdullah al-Fawzan (lahir 1933 M / 1352 H)** adalah seorang ulama senior Arab Saudi dan anggota Majlis Ulama Senior (Haiah Kibarul Ulama), Lajnah Daimah (Komite Tetap untuk Penelitian Islam dan Fatwa), serta beberapa lembaga keagamaan terkemuka lainnya di Arab Saudi. Lahir di desa Asy-Syamasiyyah di wilayah Al-Qashim, beliau menempuh pendidikan di Universitas Islam Imam Muhammad bin Saud dan kemudian meraih gelar doktor dalam bidang fikih.

Al-Fawzan telah menulis banyak karya dalam bidang fikih Islam, akidah, dan isu-isu kontemporer. Karya beliau yang paling banyak dipelajari adalah Al-Mulakhkhas Al-Fiqhi, sebuah panduan fikih Hanbali yang jelas dan menyeluruh yang menjadi buku teks standar di lembaga-lembaga keagamaan Arab Saudi. Beliau juga mengarang Syarh Al-Aqidah Al-Wasithiyyah, sebuah syarah atas teks akidah Ibnu Taimiyyah; I'anatul Mustafid bi Syarh Kitabit Tauhid, sebuah syarah atas karya akidah Muhammad bin Abdul Wahhab; serta Al-Irsyad ila Shahihil I'tiqad, sebuah karya tentang akidah Islam yang benar.

Al-Fawzan adalah salah satu tokoh agama paling terkemuka di Arab Saudi dan bertugas sebagai anggota lembaga-lembaga penasihat keagamaan tertinggi di kerajaan tersebut. Beliau telah mengajar di Universitas Islam Imam Muhammad bin Saud selama beberapa dekade, dan di antara murid-muridnya terdapat banyak ulama dan hakim Arab Saudi dari generasi saat ini. Karya-karya beliau digunakan secara luas dalam kurikulum pendidikan Islam, dan fatwa-fatwa beliau memiliki bobot yang signifikan dalam kalangan ulama Arab Saudi.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Yemeni hadith scholar who established Dar al-Hadith in Dammaj, known for strict hadith methodology.
bio_en:
Muqbil ibn Hadi ibn Muqbil al-Wadi'i (1933-2001 CE / 1352-1422 AH) was a Yemeni hadith scholar who founded Dar al-Hadith in the village of Dammaj in Sa'dah province, Yemen. Born in the Wadi'ah area of Sa'dah, he traveled to Saudi Arabia where he studied at the Islamic University of Madinah under scholars including Abdul-Aziz ibn Baz and Muhammad Nasir ad-Din al-Albani.

Al-Wadi'i returned to Yemen and established Dar al-Hadith in Dammaj, which grew into one of the most important centers for hadith study in the Muslim world, attracting students from dozens of countries. His works include as-Sahih al-Musnad mimma laysa fi as-Sahihayn, a collection of authentic hadith not found in Bukhari and Muslim; ar-Riyad al-Jannah fir-Radd ala A'da as-Sunnah, a defense of the Sunnah; and ash-Shafa'ah, on the concept of intercession. He also authored works on hadith methodology and narrator criticism.

Al-Wadi'i was known for his strict adherence to hadith-based scholarship and his emphasis on authentic narrations in all matters of religion. Dar al-Hadith in Dammaj became a center of Salafi learning that produced graduates who went on to establish schools and circles of learning across Yemen, East Africa, and Southeast Asia. Despite operating in difficult conditions in one of Yemen's most remote regions, he built an institution of international significance. He passed away in Jeddah while receiving medical treatment.
bio_id:
Muqbil ibn Hadi ibn Muqbil al-Wadi'i (1933-2001 M / 1352-1422 H) adalah seorang ulama hadits dari Yaman yang mendirikan Dar al-Hadith di desa Dammaj, provinsi Sa'dah, Yaman. Lahir di kawasan Wadi'ah di Sa'dah, beliau merantau ke Arab Saudi untuk menuntut ilmu di Universitas Islam Madinah di bawah bimbingan para ulama, antara lain Abdul-Aziz ibn Baz dan Muhammad Nasir ad-Din al-Albani.

Al-Wadi'i kembali ke Yaman dan mendirikan Dar al-Hadith di Dammaj, yang kemudian berkembang menjadi salah satu pusat kajian hadits terpenting di dunia Islam, menarik para pelajar dari puluhan negara. Karya-karyanya mencakup as-Sahih al-Musnad mimma laysa fi as-Sahihayn, sebuah kumpulan hadits shahih yang tidak terdapat dalam Bukhari dan Muslim; ar-Riyad al-Jannah fir-Radd ala A'da as-Sunnah, sebuah pembelaan terhadap Sunnah; serta ash-Shafa'ah, yang membahas konsep syafa'at. Beliau juga mengarang sejumlah karya dalam bidang metodologi hadits dan ilmu jarh wa ta'dil.

Al-Wadi'i dikenal dengan keteguhannya dalam berpegang pada keilmuan berbasis hadits serta penekanannya pada riwayat-riwayat yang shahih dalam setiap persoalan agama. Dar al-Hadith di Dammaj menjadi pusat pembelajaran Salafi yang melahirkan lulusan-lulusan yang kemudian mendirikan sekolah dan majelis ilmu di seluruh Yaman, Afrika Timur, dan Asia Tenggara. Meski beroperasi dalam kondisi yang sulit di salah satu daerah terpencil di Yaman, beliau berhasil membangun sebuah lembaga yang memiliki pengaruh internasional. Beliau wafat di Jeddah saat sedang menjalani perawatan medis.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Saudi scholar known for his extensive fatwa collection and teaching.
bio_en:
Abdullah ibn Abdurrahman ibn Abdullah ibn Jibrin (1933-2009 CE / 1352-1430 AH) was a prominent Saudi scholar, teacher, and mufti known for his extensive fatawa and his tireless dedication to teaching. Born in the town of al-Quway'iyyah west of Riyadh, he studied under leading Saudi scholars including Shaykh Muhammad ibn Ibrahim Aal ash-Sheikh and Shaykh Abd al-Aziz ibn Baz.

Ibn Jibrin served as a member of the Permanent Committee for Islamic Research and Fatwa (al-Lajnah ad-Da'imah) in Saudi Arabia for many years, participating in the collective religious guidance of millions of Muslims. He was also a teacher at the Faculty of Sharia at the Imam Muhammad ibn Saud Islamic University. He authored numerous works covering aqeedah, fiqh, hadith commentary, and Islamic thought.

He was known for his accessibility — spending long hours answering questions from students and the general public, and his fatawa covered nearly every aspect of contemporary Muslim life. His works include Sharh Zad al-Mustaqni' (a commentary on the major Hanbali legal text) and commentaries on key works of Hanbali aqeedah. He adhered firmly to the Hanbali legal tradition and Athari creed.

Ibn Jibrin was sometimes noted for holding independent positions on contemporary questions, including some views that differed from the official positions of the Permanent Committee. His dedication to teaching, fatawa, and scholarship was remarkable for the volume and breadth of the questions he addressed throughout his career. He passed away in Riyadh in 2009, and his extensive fatawa archives continue to be consulted as a valuable reference in Hanbali jurisprudence.
bio_id:
Abdullah ibn Abdurrahman ibn Abdullah ibn Jibrin (1933–2009 M / 1352–1430 H) adalah seorang ulama, pengajar, dan mufti terkemuka dari Arab Saudi yang dikenal karena fatawa-fatawanya yang luas serta dedikasinya yang tak kenal lelah dalam bidang pengajaran. Beliau lahir di kota al-Quway'iyyah, sebelah barat Riyadh, dan menuntut ilmu di bawah bimbingan ulama-ulama besar Arab Saudi, di antaranya Syaikh Muhammad ibn Ibrahim Aal asy-Syaikh dan Syaikh Abd al-Aziz ibn Baz.

Ibn Jibrin menjabat sebagai anggota al-Lajnah ad-Da'imah lil-Buhuts al-Ilmiyyah wal-Ifta' (Komite Tetap untuk Penelitian Ilmiah dan Fatwa) di Arab Saudi selama bertahun-tahun, turut berpartisipasi dalam memberikan bimbingan keagamaan bagi jutaan umat Islam. Beliau juga mengajar di Fakultas Syariah Universitas Islam Imam Muhammad ibn Saud. Beliau mengarang banyak karya yang mencakup bidang aqidah, fiqh, syarah hadits, dan pemikiran Islam.

Beliau dikenal karena kemudahan aksesnya — menghabiskan waktu berjam-jam untuk menjawab pertanyaan dari para penuntut ilmu maupun masyarakat umum, dan fatawa-fatawanya mencakup hampir setiap aspek kehidupan Muslim kontemporer. Karya-karyanya antara lain Syarh Zad al-Mustaqni' (syarah atas kitab fiqh Hanbali yang masyhur) serta syarah atas karya-karya pokok dalam aqidah Hanbali. Beliau berpegang teguh pada mazhab Hanbali dan aqidah Athariyyah.

Ibn Jibrin terkadang dikenal karena memiliki pendapat independen dalam persoalan-persoalan kontemporer, termasuk beberapa pandangan yang berbeda dari posisi resmi al-Lajnah ad-Da'imah. Dedikasinya dalam bidang pengajaran, fatawa, dan keilmuan sangat menonjol, tercermin dari volume dan keluasan pertanyaan yang beliau tangani sepanjang kariernya. Beliau wafat di Riyadh pada tahun 2009, dan arsip fatawa-fatawanya yang luas hingga kini masih terus dirujuk sebagai sumber acuan berharga dalam fiqh Hanbali.

bio_short_en: Yemeni hadith scholar who established Dar al-Hadith in Dammaj, Yemen. Known for his work in hadith authentication and his efforts to spread the Sunnah in Yemen.
bio_en:
Muqbil ibn Hadi al-Wadi'i (1933-2001 CE / 1352-1422 AH) was a prominent Yemeni scholar and hadith specialist who established one of the most significant institutions for hadith study in the contemporary Muslim world. Born in the Wadi'ah region of Sa'dah province in northern Yemen, he traveled to Saudi Arabia for education, studying at the Islamic University of Madinah under scholars such as Ibn Baz and al-Albani, before returning to Yemen to establish his school.

His center, Dar al-Hadith in Dammaj, attracted thousands of students from across the Muslim world who came to study hadith sciences, Arabic, and other Islamic disciplines in an intensive traditional setting. His published works include as-Sahih al-Musnad min Asbab an-Nuzul on the authentic occasions of Quranic revelation, al-Jami as-Sahih mimma laysa fis-Sahihayn on authentic hadith outside Bukhari and Muslim, and al-Mustalah on hadith terminology. He also authored works critiquing movements and ideas he considered deviations from Salafi methodology.

Al-Wadi'i's impact on Islamic education in Yemen was transformative. Before his school, Yemen had limited access to hadith-based scholarship. The graduates of Dammaj established study centers and mosques across Yemen and in other countries, creating a network of hadith education that continues today. He was known for his asceticism, his dedication to knowledge, and his refusal of worldly comforts despite the support he received. He passed away in Jeddah while being treated for illness.
bio_id:
Muqbil ibn Hadi al-Wadi'i (1933-2001 M / 1352-1422 H) adalah seorang ulama Yaman terkemuka dan spesialis hadits yang mendirikan salah satu lembaga pengkajian hadits paling berpengaruh di dunia Muslim kontemporer. Lahir di wilayah Wadi'ah, provinsi Sa'dah, di utara Yaman, ia merantau ke Arab Saudi untuk menuntut ilmu, belajar di Universitas Islam Madinah di bawah bimbingan para ulama seperti Ibn Baz dan al-Albani, sebelum kembali ke Yaman untuk mendirikan pesantrennya.

Lembaganya, Dar al-Hadits di Dammaj, menarik ribuan santri dari seluruh penjuru dunia Muslim yang datang untuk mempelajari ilmu hadits, bahasa Arab, dan berbagai disiplin ilmu Islam lainnya dalam lingkungan tradisional yang intensif. Karya-karya yang ia terbitkan antara lain as-Sahih al-Musnad min Asbab an-Nuzul tentang asbabun nuzul yang sahih, al-Jami as-Sahih mimma laysa fis-Sahihayn tentang hadits-hadits sahih di luar Bukhari dan Muslim, serta al-Mustalah tentang terminologi ilmu hadits. Ia juga menulis karya-karya yang mengkritik gerakan dan pemikiran yang ia anggap menyimpang dari manhaj Salafi.

Pengaruh al-Wadi'i terhadap pendidikan Islam di Yaman sangat besar. Sebelum berdirinya pesantrennya, Yaman memiliki akses yang sangat terbatas terhadap kajian berbasis hadits. Para lulusan Dammaj mendirikan pusat-pusat kajian dan masjid di seluruh Yaman dan di berbagai negara lain, membentuk jaringan pendidikan hadits yang terus berlanjut hingga kini. Ia dikenal karena kezuhudannya, ketekunannya dalam menuntut ilmu, dan penolakannya terhadap kemewahan duniawi meskipun ia mendapat banyak dukungan. Ia wafat di Jeddah saat menjalani perawatan karena sakit.

bio_short_en: Saudi hadith scholar and former vice-chancellor of the Islamic University of Medina. Known for his extensive commentary on Sunan Abu Dawud and other hadith works.
bio_en:
Abdul-Muhsin ibn Hamad ibn Abdul-Muhsin al-Abbad al-Badr (b. 1934 CE / 1353 AH) is a Saudi hadith scholar who served as the vice-chancellor of the Islamic University of Madinah and has been one of the most prominent teachers at the Prophet's Mosque. Born in Zulfi in the Riyadh region, he studied under leading Saudi scholars and has devoted his life to teaching hadith and its related sciences.

Al-Abbad's most important scholarly contribution is his extensive commentary on Sunan Abi Dawud, delivered as lectures over many years at the Prophet's Mosque in Madinah and compiled as Sharh Sunan Abi Dawud. This multi-volume work provides detailed explanation of the hadith texts, their chains of narration, and their legal implications. He has also authored Sharh Arba'in an-Nawawiyyah, a commentary on an-Nawawi's forty hadith, and numerous treatises on creedal topics and scholarly methodology.

Al-Abbad played a central role in shaping the Islamic University of Madinah during its formative years and has been one of the most senior and respected teachers in the Prophet's Mosque for decades. His lectures are attended by students and scholars from around the world, and his recordings are widely distributed. He is known for his balanced approach, his gentleness with students, and his vast knowledge of hadith and the biographical literature of narrators. He continues to teach and contribute to Islamic scholarship from Madinah.
bio_id:
Abdul-Muhsin ibn Hamad ibn Abdul-Muhsin al-Abbad al-Badr (lahir 1934 M / 1353 H) adalah seorang ulama hadits asal Arab Saudi yang pernah menjabat sebagai wakil rektor Universitas Islam Madinah dan menjadi salah satu pengajar paling terkemuka di Masjid Nabawi. Beliau lahir di Zulfi, kawasan Riyadh, belajar kepada ulama-ulama terkemuka Arab Saudi, dan mengabdikan hidupnya untuk mengajarkan hadits beserta ilmu-ilmu yang berkaitan dengannya.

Karya ilmiah terpenting al-Abbad adalah syarahnya yang sangat luas terhadap Sunan Abi Dawud, yang disampaikan dalam bentuk ceramah selama bertahun-tahun di Masjid Nabawi, Madinah, kemudian dikompilasi menjadi Sharh Sunan Abi Dawud. Karya multi-jilid ini memberikan penjelasan terperinci mengenai teks-teks hadits, sanad-sanadnya, serta implikasi hukumnya. Beliau juga menulis Sharh Arba'in an-Nawawiyyah, yaitu syarah terhadap empat puluh hadits an-Nawawi, serta berbagai risalah tentang topik-topik aqidah dan metodologi keilmuan.

Al-Abbad memainkan peran sentral dalam membentuk Universitas Islam Madinah pada masa-masa awal berdirinya, dan selama beberapa dekade menjadi salah satu pengajar paling senior dan dihormati di Masjid Nabawi. Ceramah-ceramah beliau dihadiri oleh para pelajar dan ulama dari seluruh penjuru dunia, dan rekaman-rekamannya tersebar luas. Beliau dikenal dengan pendekatan yang seimbang, kelembutan terhadap para murid, serta penguasaannya yang luas dalam bidang hadits dan ilmu rijal. Beliau terus mengajar dan memberikan sumbangsih kepada khazanah keilmuan Islam dari Madinah.

title: Mufti
bio_short_en: Pakistani Hanafi scholar, former judge of the Shariah Appellate Bench, and a leading authority on Islamic finance.
bio_en:
Muhammad Taqi ibn Muhammad Shafi Usmani (b. 1943 CE / 1362 AH) is a Pakistani Hanafi scholar, former judge of the Shariah Appellate Bench of the Supreme Court of Pakistan, and one of the world's foremost authorities on Islamic finance. Born in Deoband, India (before the partition), he is the son of the renowned Mufti Muhammad Shafi, the first Grand Mufti of Pakistan and author of Ma'arif al-Quran.

Mufti Taqi Usmani studied at Darul Uloom Karachi and also earned a law degree, combining traditional Islamic scholarship with modern legal training. His scholarly works include Takmilat Fath al-Mulhim, completing the commentary on Sahih Muslim that was begun by al-Kashmiri and continued by his father; Buhuth fi Qadaya Fiqhiyyah Mu'asirah (Discussions on Contemporary Juristic Issues), addressing modern legal questions from an Islamic perspective; and In'am al-Bari, lectures on Sahih al-Bukhari. His works in Urdu, including Taqi's commentary on the Quran and his travelogues, are also widely read.

Mufti Taqi Usmani is considered the architect of modern Islamic finance. He served as chairman or member of Shariah advisory boards for numerous Islamic banks, financial institutions, and the Accounting and Auditing Organization for Islamic Financial Institutions (AAOIFI). His legal opinions and scholarly framework for Islamic banking, sukuk (Islamic bonds), and other financial instruments have shaped the multi-trillion-dollar Islamic finance industry. He continues to serve as a global authority on Hanafi jurisprudence and Islamic finance from Karachi.
bio_id:
Muhammad Taqi ibn Muhammad Shafi Usmani (lahir 1943 M / 1362 H) adalah seorang ulama Hanafi asal Pakistan, mantan hakim di Mahkamah Banding Syariah Mahkamah Agung Pakistan, dan salah satu otoritas terkemuka dunia dalam bidang keuangan Islam. Beliau lahir di Deoband, India (sebelum pemisahan wilayah), dan merupakan putra dari Mufti Muhammad Shafi yang masyhur, Grand Mufti pertama Pakistan sekaligus pengarang Ma'arif al-Quran.

Mufti Taqi Usmani menempuh pendidikan di Darul Uloom Karachi dan juga meraih gelar di bidang hukum, memadukan keilmuan Islam tradisional dengan pelatihan hukum modern. Di antara karya ilmiahnya adalah Takmilat Fath al-Mulhim, yang merupakan pelengkap syarah Sahih Muslim yang dimulai oleh al-Kashmiri dan dilanjutkan oleh ayahnya; Buhuth fi Qadaya Fiqhiyyah Mu'asirah (Pembahasan Isu-Isu Hukum Kontemporer), yang mengkaji persoalan hukum modern dari sudut pandang Islam; serta In'am al-Bari, kumpulan kuliah tentang Sahih al-Bukhari. Karya-karyanya dalam bahasa Urdu, termasuk tafsir al-Quran dan catatan perjalanannya, juga dibaca secara luas.

Mufti Taqi Usmani dianggap sebagai arsitek keuangan Islam modern. Beliau pernah menjabat sebagai ketua atau anggota dewan syariah di berbagai bank Islam, lembaga keuangan, serta Organisasi Akuntansi dan Audit untuk Lembaga Keuangan Islam (AAOIFI). Fatwa dan kerangka keilmuannya dalam perbankan Islam, sukuk, dan instrumen keuangan lainnya telah membentuk industri keuangan Islam yang bernilai triliunan dolar. Hingga kini, beliau terus berkhidmat sebagai otoritas global dalam fikih Hanafi dan keuangan Islam dari Karachi.

title: Sheikh
bio_short_en: Saudi scholar and member of the Council of Senior Scholars, author of works on etiquette and fiqh terminology.
bio_en:
Bakr ibn Abdullah Abu Zayd ibn Muhammad ibn Abdullah ibn Bakr (1944-2008 CE / 1364-1429 AH) was a Saudi scholar and member of the Council of Senior Scholars, the Permanent Committee for Islamic Research and Ifta, and the International Islamic Fiqh Academy.
